data.title: Trump Reportedly Brings Mar-A-Lago Style To Oval Office With Gilded Makeover: White House 'Doesn't Belong To Any One President,' Says Expert
data.description: President Donald Trump is transforming the White House with gold accents reminiscent of his Florida club Mar-a-Lago, bringing his signature style to the historic residence less than three months into his second term.

EXCLUSIVE: Ligand Subsidiary Pelthos Therapeutics To Combine with Channel Therapeutics Creating Pain Medicines Focused Entity
data.description: Ligand and Channel Therapeutics to merge in $50 million deal to launch Zelsuvmi for molluscum and advance NaV 1.7 chronic pain programs.

data.title: Nancy Pelosi Called US-China Trade "A Job Loser:" Old Remarks Reemerge Amid Trump Tariff Push
data.description: A 29-year-old video of Rep. Nancy Pelosi resurfaces, showing her advocating for measures similar to Trump's tariff policies on China.

data.title: Not Buying A New Car? You May Still Pay An Extra $300 Due To Trump's Auto Tariffs: Here's More
data.description: President Donald Trump's auto tariffs are expected to drive up car insurance and repair costs, affecting even drivers who aren't buying new vehicles.
